---
title: "Hello there!"
pagetitle: "Lena Veretennik"
description-meta: "Lena Veretennik is a PhD candidate at KU Leuven, researching science-technology links and network in innovation and economics of science."
title-block-banner: "#606c38"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
![](files/photo.png){.rounded-circle fig-align="center" width=200px}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-9}
I'm a PhD candidate in the [Department of Management, Strategy and Innovation](https://feb.kuleuven.be/research/MSI/home) at the Faculty of Economics and Business [KU Leuven](https://www.kuleuven.be). 

My research explores science-technology links, external knowledge sourcing, and the role of individual connectivity in innovation.

I am broadly interested in how various social networks, from informal ties to strategic partnerships, influence innovation and performance. I examine topics at the intersection of strategic management, innovation, and the economics of science and technology.

Before my PhD, I worked on organizational and social network consulting, led data science projects, and taught data-oriented courses in economics and business.

**I am on the 2026-2027 academic job market.**
:::

:::
